Get in touch

We'll follow up to sort out details and delivery.

All couches ship in the box — self-assembly is simple if you'd rather skip a fee. Delivery starts at $100, assembly starts at $100 (both optional, and separate from each other). Our stock is split between Festus, MO and O'Fallon, MO — we'll let you know which is closer once we hear from you.

Fastest way to grab a couch: text us. Tap below — the message writes itself, you just hit send.

📱 Text Us About This Couch 📞 Call (636) 696-6645

Goes straight to our phone — no forms, no waiting. Available most days, 3–8pm.

Redefined Couches — locally owned, local delivery & setup, out of Festus and O'Fallon, MO. No online purchases — every order is confirmed with us directly.
